title: Keiko Counts Sweet Dreams
synopsis: Join baby Keiko as she counts her way to dreamland with one yawning moon, two sleepy teddy bears, three singing birds, and more gentle bedtime friends. Each page features soft counting and soothing sounds that help little ones wind down for sleep.

pages.text: One moon says yaaaawn. Good night, Keiko!

illustration.description: Baby Keiko with straight black hair in soft pink pajamas sits by her bedroom window, looking up at a large, sleepy moon with droopy eyes. The moon is pale yellow against a deep purple night sky with twinkling stars. Keiko's room has warm peach walls and a cozy feel.
illustration.alt: Baby Keiko looking at a sleepy moon through her window

pages.text: Two bears go snooooore. Sleepy bears!

illustration.description: Two cuddly teddy bears, one brown and one cream-colored, sleeping peacefully on Keiko's bed. The bears have gentle, closed eyes and soft smiles. Keiko reaches toward them with her small hands. The bed has lavender sheets and a rainbow quilt.
illustration.alt: Two teddy bears snoring on Keiko's bed

pages.text: Three birds sing tweet-tweet-tweet. Soft songs!

illustration.description: Three small, round birds perched on a branch outside Keiko's window. The birds are soft pastels - pink, blue, and yellow - with tiny musical notes floating around them. Keiko watches them from inside, pressing her small hand against the window glass.
illustration.alt: Three colorful birds singing outside Keiko's window

pages.text: Four stars go twinkle-twinkle. Sparkly lights!

illustration.description: Four large, friendly stars with smiling faces twinkle in the night sky above Keiko's house. The stars glow with soft white and golden light. Keiko stands at her window in her pink pajamas, pointing up at them with wonder in her dark eyes.
illustration.alt: Four twinkling stars with happy faces in the night sky

pages.text: Five sheep say baaaa-baaaa. Fluffy friends!

illustration.description: Five puffy white sheep with rosy cheeks hop gently over a low wooden fence in Keiko's imagination. The sheep have sleepy expressions and soft wool. Keiko lies in her bed watching them with a peaceful smile, her head on a cloud-patterned pillow.
illustration.alt: Five fluffy sheep jumping over a fence in Keiko's dreams

pages.text: Six fireflies buzz bzzzz. Gentle glow!

illustration.description: Six tiny fireflies with soft yellow-green glowing bodies float around Keiko's room like fairy lights. Keiko sits cross-legged on her bed in her pink pajamas, reaching out gently toward the magical insects. The room is dimly lit with a warm, golden atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Six glowing fireflies buzzing around Keiko's bedroom

pages.text: Seven flowers whisper shhhh-shhhh. Quiet time!

illustration.description: Seven soft, pastel flowers in a vase on Keiko's nightstand seem to whisper sleepy sounds. The flowers are in gentle colors - lavender, peach, and pale yellow. Keiko leans close to smell them, her eyes getting heavy with sleepiness.
illustration.alt: Seven whispering flowers in a vase by Keiko's bed

pages.text: Eight hugs from Mama. Squeeze tight! Sweet dreams, little Keiko.

illustration.description: Keiko's mama, a gentle woman with long black hair, gives her daughter eight soft hugs while tucking her into bed. Both have peaceful, loving expressions. The room is bathed in soft moonlight streaming through the window. Keiko's eyes are nearly closed as she snuggles into her cozy blankets.
illustration.alt: Mama giving sleepy Keiko eight gentle goodnight hugs

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What does the moon say?
questions.explanation: The sleepy moon says 'yaaaawn' to show it's bedtime!

questions.question: How many teddy bears are on Keiko's bed?
questions.explanation: Two cuddly teddy bears are snoring on Keiko's bed!

questions.question: Who gives Keiko eight hugs?
questions.explanation: Mama gives Keiko eight loving hugs before bed!
